meta.title: FaceWeb Tutorial — Joe Walker
meta.description: Introductory social-engineering encounter. Player cross-references Joe's public FaceWeb profile and uses Venom to extract overshared personal details useful for security questions.

venom_connect.text:
Venom — Direct Message
New contact request accepted.
Joe Walker is online.

joe_greeting.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_greeting.text: Hey!! Sorry, Venom profile pic is just a default spider emoji so I wasn't sure who this was 😅 You must be from the Walker High reunion page?? I literally JUST joined FaceWeb last week. Small world!

choices.text: Yeah! FaceWeb suggested we might know each other. How've you been?
We went to school together — don't you remember?
I need answers about your accounts. Now.

joe_suspicious.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_suspicious.text: Uh. That's weird. I don't know you. My cousin got phished last month so I'm gonna block this number. Be safe out there I guess??

choices.text: Haha sorry, wrong Joe! Meant to message Joe Martinez from chem class.
[End conversation]

effects.addJournalEntry: Joe Walker blocked me on Venom. Need a softer approach on FaceWeb targets.

joe_overshare_intro.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_overshare_intro.text: Oh man, SO much has happened! Got promoted to regional sales at DataVault Solutions — that's in the Meridian Tower downtown, 14th floor, corner office with the sad ficus. Started March 3rd, which is funny because March 3rd is also my birthday 🎂 (Pisces!!). Anyway I'm terrible at keeping in touch. Classic Joe, right?

choices.text: March 3rd — I'll send a card! What year again? I lost my yearbook.
DataVault Solutions, wow. What's your work email? I'll add you properly.
Classic Joe! How's the family? Last I heard your mom was doing a genealogy project.

joe_birthday_overshare.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_birthday_overshare.text: 1989! Same year as Taylor Swift, which my ex said explained a lot about me lol. Venmo me @JoeWalker89 if you ever owe me coffee money — that's literally my password hint on everything, my IT guy said not to use it but who listens to IT 😂

choices.text: 1989, got it. What do you do to celebrate?

effects.addJournalEntry: Joe Walker — DOB: March 3, 1989. Venmo: @JoeWalker89 (uses as password hint).

choices.text: Ha! So your mom finished that genealogy thing?

joe_work_overshare.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_work_overshare.text: joe.walker@datavault-solutions.com — and yes the hyphen is annoying, IT says it's for 'security branding' whatever that means. Employee ID is JW-4471 if you ever need to badge me in, which why would you, but I wrote it on a sticky note on my monitor so now you know too 🙃

choices.text: Got it saved. Must be hectic at a data company!

effects.addJournalEntry: Joe Walker — Work: joe.walker@datavault-solutions.com, Employee ID JW-4471, Meridian Tower 14F.

choices.text: Data company — bet they make you use crazy security questions.

joe_family_overshare.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_family_overshare.text: She finished it!! Found out her maiden name was Castellano — Dad's side is all Walker obviously. She gets mad when I forget and put 'Smith' on forms because I always mix up maiden vs married names. Also my sister's wedding is in Castellano, Italy next spring, which is NOT related but sounds related lol

choices.text: Castellano — beautiful name. Italy sounds amazing.

effects.addJournalEntry: Joe Walker — Mother's maiden name: Castellano.

choices.text: Italy! Will you board your dog or bring him?

joe_pet_overshare.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_pet_overshare.text: MR. PICKLES!! My golden retriever, named after my grandpa's pickle recipe, don't ask. He's my 'first pet' answer on EVERYTHING — bank, gym, streaming, my work VPN reset portal. I even put it on a custom collar tag because I kept forgetting which security question I picked 😅

choices.text: Mr. Pickles is a legend. Send pics!

effects.addJournalEntry: Joe Walker — First pet / security answer: Mr. Pickles (golden retriever).

choices.text: Work VPN too? What else do they make you remember?

joe_security_overshare.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_security_overshare.text: Oh man the VPN is the worst. Three security questions: first pet (Mr. Pickles obvi), city you were born (Springfield — Illinois, NOT the Simpsons one, people always ask), and favorite teacher (Mrs. Gable, 4th grade, she believed in me). I have them in my Notes app titled 'NOT PASSWORDS' which is probably worse than a sticky note

choices.text: Mrs. Gable sounds great. Springfield, IL — noted!

effects.addJournalEntry: Joe Walker — Security Q answers: Mr. Pickles | Springfield, IL | Mrs. Gable.

choices.text: Can you screenshot your Notes app? I want to see the formatting.

joe_wakes_up.speaker: Joe Walker
joe_wakes_up.text: Wait. Why would you need a screenshot of my security questions? That's... actually really not okay. I'm gonna go. Nice knowing you I guess??

choices.text: [End conversation — partial intel gathered]

effects.addJournalEntry: Joe Walker got spooked before I got everything. Revisit FaceWeb for more public data.

tutorial_success.speaker: Joe Walker
tutorial_success.text: Anyway!! Great catching up. We should get coffee at that place on Maple — Brewed Awakening? I'm there every Tuesday morning before standup. Don't be a stranger! 🕷️✌️

choices.text: [Close Venom — add findings to journal]

effects.addJournalEntry: Tutorial complete: Joe Walker overshares on Venom. FaceWeb profile + chat = enough for password reset attacks.

tutorial_fail.text: Contact blocked. Return to FaceWeb and gather more public information before trying again.

tutorial_complete.text: Objective updated: Use collected personal details to access password-protected systems.
